name: telegram-communicator
description: Use Telegram from Codex through a local MCP server for notifications, questions, and file sharing.

interface.shortDescription: Send Telegram notifications and questions from Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds a Telegram MCP server to Codex for asking questions, sending notifications, sharing files, and sending project archives through a configured Telegram bot.
defaultPrompt: Notify me on Telegram when this task finishes
